text.title: minimum-product-frameworks Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for minimum-product-frameworks as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Applying MVP to every product regardless of market context.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: "MVP" as a default ignores market conditions. In competitive markets it produces products that users dismiss before forming a habit.

failure-mode.description: Choosing MLP or MDP for an unvalidated problem.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Investing in delight before validating demand is expensive misdirection. Polishing a product nobody wants is still a product nobody wants.

failure-mode.description: Mixing two frameworks in one release ("we'll do MLP+MMP at the same time").
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Frameworks optimise for different success metrics. Pursuing both forces compromises in scope and dilutes the validation signal.
